Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT bs."in.comstock_building_type" AS comstock_building_type, sum(1) AS sample_count, sum(bs.weight) AS units_count, sum((up."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh" - up."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption..kwh") * bs.weight) AS elec_minus_gas FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_by_state_and_county_parquet AS bs JOIN comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_by_state_and_county_parquet AS up ON bs.bldg_id = up.bldg_id AND bs."in.nhgis_tract_gisjoin" = up."in.nhgis_tract_gisjoin" AND bs.state = up.state AND bs.upgrade = 0 AND up.upgrade = 1 AND up.applicability = true WHERE bs.applicability = true AND bs.upgrade = 0 AND bs.state IN ('CO', 'NM') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/56c99f121bc784fee9dd05902aeccc90578421b52b7976b1af0ad073195f121d/34cc5dc4-b4a8-432a-8cae-54169e795fed/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
